name: Deadwood Recreation Center
description: Deadwood Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Deadwood, SD. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Lead SD Pickleball
description: 4 brand new pickleball courts with a great view of nature! Located in the quaint and historical town of Lead SD.  A neighbor to the infamous town of Deadwood SD. Nestled in the northern part of the Black Hills National Forest. Home to Mount Rushmore and Crazy Horse Memorial Monument.

name: Martha Bullock Park
description: Martha Bullock Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Deadwood, SD. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Spearfish Aquatic & Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Spearfish Aquatic & Recreation Center in Spearfish, SD! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Spearfish City Park
description: Beautiful courts with wind screens and benches court side
